name: Astral
title: Astral by HTML5 UP
description: Compact single-page portfolio with a unique panel-based layout. Left-side icon navigation bar (home, folder, envelope, twitter icons) stays fixed. Content appears as overlapping panels: intro panel with profile photo and name/title, work panel with a 4x3 responsive image grid (12 thumbnails), and contact panel with a full form (name, email, subject, message). Background uses a subtle overlay texture. Monochrome color scheme with no chromatic accent — pure grayscale elegance.

typography.style: Large base font size for readability. Light weight body, regular headings. Minimal, clean typography.

layoutDetails: Panel-based layout with fixed left icon navigation. Content panels overlap and transition. No traditional scrolling sections — panels slide/fade. Image grid uses flexbox with responsive columns (4-col → 6-col → 12-col). No container max-width, panels are self-contained.
visualStyle: Minimal, monochrome, elegant. Pure grayscale palette — no chromatic colors at all. Clean panels with subtle shadows. Profile photo as visual anchor. Grid-based work showcase. Understated and sophisticated.

name: Stylish Portfolio
title: Stylish Portfolio - Start Bootstrap Template
description: Single-page portfolio with a slide-out sidebar navigation (hamburger toggle, dark overlay). Full-viewport hero section with background image, centered heading, subtitle, and CTA button. About section with centered text on light background. Services section on primary-color background with 4-column icon grid (rounded circle icons using Simple Line Icons: smartphone, pencil, like, mustache). Callout section with background image and CTA. Portfolio section with 2x2 image grid (hover overlay reveals title and description). Call-to-action section with two buttons on primary background. Embedded Google Maps iframe. Footer with 3 circular social links and copyright. Scroll-to-top button.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with bold headings. Source Sans Pro provides a professional, readable feel. Italic subtitles for emphasis.

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 5 grid system. Full-width sections with container padding. Sidebar navigation slides in from left with dark overlay. Portfolio uses 2-column grid (col-lg-6). Services use 4-column grid (col-lg-3). Responsive breakpoints at 576px, 768px, 992px, 1200px.
visualStyle: Professional and clean with teal-blue accent color. Background images with gradient overlays for hero and callout sections. Rounded circle icons for services. Hover effects on portfolio items with dark overlay captions.

name: Tyndale
title: Tyndale
description: Dark-themed creative portfolio/agency single-page template with a bold intro section featuring a large headline ('We're a creative group of people who design influential brands and digital experiences'), scroll-down arrow, and a colored background block. Below the intro is an about section with company description and 4 animated statistics counters (Happy Customers 30+, Hours Work 35+, Coffee Drinks 41+, Completed Projects 38+) in a 4-column grid. Services section presents 6 service items (Product Design, Branding, Frontend Development, UX Research, Illustration, E-Commerce) in a 2-column grid with custom SVG service icons. Works section shows 6 portfolio items in a 3-column grid with image thumbnails and hover overlays. Includes clients logo section, video block with play button, testimonials slider, and contact section. Footer has contact info, copyright, social SVG icons, and back-to-top button. Header has logo, horizontal nav, and social icons.

typography.style: Modern dual sans-serif pairing, clean geometric feel with muted body text on dark background

layoutDetails: Custom CSS grid with responsive column classes (lg-12, block-lg-one-half, etc.). Full-width sections with centered content. Stats use animated counters. Portfolio uses 3-column grid collapsing to 2 then 1. Responsive from 400px to 1400px.
visualStyle: Dark sophisticated agency aesthetic with teal accents, bold typography, animated stat counters, SVG icons, clean geometric layout

name: Kross
title: Kross - Creative Portfolio Template
description: Creative portfolio template with light theme and deep purple accent. Parallax hero section with large animated text and scroll indicator. Navigation with logo and links (Home, About, Blog, Portfolio, Contact). Skills section with progress bars showing proficiency levels. Experience section with timeline layout. Education section with timeline entries. Services section with icon cards in grid. Portfolio section with filterable image grid and shuffle animation. Blog section with article cards showing images, dates, and excerpts. Testimonial section with purple background and client quotes carousel. Client logos section. Contact section with form and Google Maps. Footer with social links.

typography.style: Elegant serif headings with clean sans-serif body, creative portfolio feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container, parallax hero, timeline layouts for experience/education, filterable portfolio grid, responsive at 1200px/991px/767px
visualStyle: Creative portfolio with deep purple accents, parallax hero, timeline sections, filterable gallery, and elegant typography

name: Phantom
title: Phantom - Bootstrap Portfolio Template
description: Dark-themed portfolio template with a moody, cinematic aesthetic. Opens with a full-viewport preview wrapper before revealing the main site. The layout features a dark sidebar/overlay navigation. The portfolio showcases work in a filterable isotope grid with hover overlays revealing project details. Large typography with serif headings (Libre Baskerville) creates elegant contrast against the dark charcoal background. A coral/red accent color highlights interactive elements. Animated text transitions, slick carousel for project showcases, and smooth page transitions. Minimal sections focus entirely on portfolio presentation.
layoutDetails: Dark full-screen layout with filterable isotope portfolio grid. Sidebar navigation overlay. Large typographic hero area. Minimal sections focused on portfolio showcase.
visualStyle: Dark cinematic portfolio with moody charcoal backgrounds, coral accent highlights, serif typography for elegance, and dramatic hover effects. High contrast. Gallery-like presentation.

typography.style: Elegant serif headings with wide letter-spacing, clean sans-serif body. Very large display sizes 68-158px.

name: Artist
title: Artist - Minimal HTML Portfolio
description: Minimal single-page portfolio for an art studio. Opens with a fullscreen hero section featuring a large background image with parallax scrolling, overlaid with a heading and subtitle text. Below, an about section splits into a left column with an image and contact email, and a right column with descriptive text. A work collection section displays four portfolio thumbnails in a 4-column grid with Magnific Popup lightbox for full-size viewing. Contact section includes a name/email/message form. Footer has three columns: studio info, address/contact details, and a newsletter signup form, plus social media icons. Preloader spinner on page load. WOW.js fade-in animations throughout.

typography.style: Elegant serif headings (Playfair Display) paired with clean sans-serif body (Nunito Sans). Classic portfolio typography with warm gold accents.

layoutDetails: Single-page vertical scroll with parallax sections. Bootstrap 3 grid. Hero is full-viewport with centered text. About uses 4/8 column split. Portfolio uses 4-column equal grid. Footer uses 3-column layout.
visualStyle: Minimal and elegant with warm gold (#d7b065) accent on black/white base. Parallax background images. Clean whitespace. Lightbox gallery. Subtle fade-in animations. Professional art studio aesthetic.

name: Kalay
title: Kalay - Portfolio HTML Template
description: Personal portfolio template built on Bootstrap 3 with parallax scrolling sections. Opens with a full-screen hero section displaying 'Hello, I am Kalay' with a brief introduction and social media links over a parallax background. The services section presents four service cards (Web Design, Photography, Creative, Marketing) with icons in a grid. An about section features a profile image with skill progress bars and personal description. The work/portfolio section displays project thumbnails in a filterable grid with Magnific Popup lightbox for full-size viewing. A contact section includes a form and contact information. Footer with social links and copyright. Uses Poppins font with a clean, professional design.

typography.style: Clean geometric sans-serif (Poppins). Bold headings with normal body weight. Lavender blue accent for interactive elements.

layoutDetails: Full-screen parallax hero. Four-column service cards grid. Two-column about section with image and skill bars. Filterable portfolio grid with lightbox. Contact form with info sidebar.
visualStyle: Clean personal portfolio with parallax backgrounds. White content sections alternating with dark parallax images. Lavender blue accent. Skill progress bars and animated entrance effects.

name: Nano Folio
title: Nano Folio - Simple HTML Template
description: Ultra-minimal portfolio template with narrow centered layout (max 940px). Colored header block with heart icon and title. About section with teal background. Gallery with Isotope filterable grid (City, Nature, Portraits) and Magnific Popup lightbox. Contact section with coral background, address, phone, social links, and form. No navbar - vertical scroll only. Three distinct colored sections create visual rhythm. Lightweight custom CSS.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with generous line-height (2em). White text on colored backgrounds.

layoutDetails: Single-page vertical scroll with narrow centered container (max 940px). No navigation bar. Three colored sections with rounded corners. Isotope grid for gallery.
visualStyle: Ultra-minimal with colored section blocks, rounded corners, and white text. Icon-driven header. Clean and lightweight.

name: Neural Portfolio
title: Neural Network Portfolio
description: Cyberpunk-themed developer portfolio with animated neural network canvas background. Dark theme with neon cyan, magenta, and yellow accents. Hero with glitch-effect text animation. About with stats cards and glassmorphism styling. Projects with six glass-effect cards. Skills with floating node-style badges. Contact form with glass-card styling. SVG neural network logo. Scanline overlay effect. Fully CSS-driven with no framework.

typography.style: Futuristic display fonts with neon glow effects. Scanline overlay adds retro-tech feel.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling with full-width sections. Fixed navbar with glassmorphism. Canvas-based animated neural network background. Projects in 3-column grid.
visualStyle: Cyberpunk/neon aesthetic with dark background, glowing neon accents, glassmorphism cards, glitch text effects, and animated canvas neural network.

name: Split Portfolio
title: Split-Screen Portfolio - Free HTML Template
description: Modern split-screen portfolio with fixed header and SVG logo. 50/50 split: project images left, detailed info right with numbered indicators, title, category, description, metadata, skill tags, case study links. Navigation dots and arrows for 5 projects. About with stats. Services grid. Testimonials. Contact form. Pure CSS, no framework.
layoutDetails: Split-screen 50/50 project showcase. Navigation dots. Split about. Grid services.
visualStyle: Editorial portfolio with split-screen showcase. Pink accent. Serif+sans-serif.

name: Stellaris Research
title: Stellaris Research - Cosmic Explorer Portfolio
description: Space-themed portfolio with animated starfield canvas, floating orbs, shooting star CSS animations. Dark cosmic scheme with purple and amber accents. Hero with large heading. About with emoji icon cards and achievement counters. Tabbed missions with status badges. Equipment list. Contact form. Multi-column footer. Space Grotesk, Orbitron, Rajdhani fonts. SVG animated logo.
layoutDetails: Single-page with canvas starfield hero. Card grid about. Tabbed missions. Contact form.
visualStyle: Immersive space-themed with starfield canvas, floating orbs, shooting stars. Purple and amber accents.

name: Titan Folio
title: Titan Folio - Creative Developer
description: Creative developer portfolio with animated floating shapes and particle effects in hero. Stat cards (100+ Projects, 5+ Years, 50+ Clients) and dual CTAs. About with mission/vision cards. Skills with circular node diagram and progress bars. Filterable vertical timeline with emoji markers, skill tags, achievement badges. Portfolio cards with hover overlays. Contact form.
layoutDetails: Single-page. Hero with particles. Circular skills diagram. Filterable timeline. Project cards. Contact form.
visualStyle: Dark creative portfolio with particles and floating shapes. Purple accent. Filterable timeline.
